All five functions found. Here's the answer:

## `ext4_file_operations` 定義
`fs/ext4/file.c:950`

## 欄位對應

| 欄位 | 賦值函式 | 定義位置 |
|---|---|---|
| `.read_iter` | `ext4_file_read_iter` | `fs/ext4/file.c:130` |
| `.write_iter` | `ext4_file_write_iter` | `fs/ext4/file.c:703` |
| `.open` | `ext4_file_open` | `fs/ext4/file.c:878` |
| `.release` | `ext4_release_file` | `fs/ext4/file.c:166` |
| `.fsync` | `ext4_sync_file` | `fs/ext4/fsync.c:129`(在 fsync.c,非 file.c) |

五個欄位在該 struct literal 中皆存在,沒有缺漏。（另外結構體中還有 `.llseek`、`.iopoll`、`.unlocked_ioctl`、`.mmap`、`.open`、`.get_unmapped_area`、`.splice_read`、`.splice_write`、`.fallocate` 等欄位,但題目未要求列出。）
